title: passovia stenophylla
intro: Passovia stenophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae, commonly known as the passionflower. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Passovia stenophylla include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Passovia stenophylla, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent.
